records.display_name: Phase 1 2013 Improvements Complete

payload.claim_text: Phase 1 (COMPLETE) 2013 Improvements: To support the launch of Bx41 Select Bus Service in June 2013, NYCDOT and NYCT implemented priority street design and safety improvements in Spring 2013 along the Webster Avenue corridor.

records.display_name: Bx41 SBS increasing popularity

payload.claim_text: Over the first six months of service, the proportion of riders choosing to ride the Bx41 SBS grew to 53%, indicating the increasing popularity of the service.

records.display_name: Bx41 ridership steadily grown since SBS launch

payload.claim_text: Ridership on the Bx41 has steadily grown since the Bx41 SBS launched in June 2013.

records.display_name: Phase 2 capital project in design

payload.claim_text: Phase 2 (IN DESIGN) 2015-16 Capital Project: In partnership with the NYC Department of Design and Construction, a capital project to build more complicated improvements along Webster Avenue is currently in design with construction planned for 2015-16.

records.display_name: Bus bulbs planned - Webster Avenue SBS stations

payload.description: 12 bus bulbs are planned for SBS stations along Webster Avenue. Bus bulbs widen the sidewalk to meet the offset bus lane at a bus stop, providing level boarding, bus shelters, benches, greening, and pedestrian wayfinding signs.
